problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: Combining Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
